reason: Verify final changes preserve global RVV-first and Stage1/Stage2 invariants.
Check scalar broadcast remains RVV plugin/typed-body owned and does not revive legacy authority.
Check common EmitC/export remains neutral and consumes provider-built route payloads only.
Check runtime ABI and ssh evidence claims are supported by generated artifact execution.
Check selected-body realization and route provider boundaries remain plugin-local.
Check focused validation and runtime evidence are attached to changed behavior.
Verify acceptance criteria and non-goals against final diff and evidence.
